consumer_purpose: Deliver the remaining 3 Phase 1 desktop app features from the audit: Agent configuration UI, Context display/overflow awareness, and Settings polish.

features.name: Agent Configuration UI
features.description: Management dialog (dialog-manage-agents.tsx) listing agents grouped by source (Built-in from SDK / Custom from electron-store) with search, create/edit/delete. Edit form (dialog-edit-agent.tsx) with name, description, system prompt, model select, variant, temperature, top_p, color picker. Settings panel (settings-agents.tsx) with Manage Agents button.

files.summary: Management dialog listing agents grouped by source (Built-in / Custom). Features: search via filterKeys, create/edit/delete buttons, color indicator dots, model display text. Loads custom agents from electron-store IPC, built-in agents from sync.data.agent.

Edit form with name (TextField, autofocus), prompt (multiline monospace), description, model (Select from connected providers), variant, temperature (0-2, step 0.1), top_p (0-1, step 0.05), color (15 swatches). Validation: name required, Save disabled when empty. crypto.randomUUID() for new agents.
Settings panel with gradient header and Manage Agents button. Uses same layout/sticky header as other settings panels. Imports and opens DialogManageAgents.

Additive: get-desktop-custom-agents and set-desktop-custom-agents handlers using electron-store (key: 'desktop-custom-agents'). get returns (store.get('agents') as unknown[]) ?? []. Both handlers append to existing registerIpcHandlers.
Additive: AgentDef type (id, name, prompt, description?, model?, variant?, temperature?, top_p?, color?, steps?). ElectronAPI gains getCustomAgents and setCustomAgents methods.
Additive: IPC bridge wiring for getCustomAgents -> get-desktop-custom-agents and setCustomAgents -> set-desktop-custom-agents.
Additive: Added SettingsAgents import, Agents tab trigger (icon: brain, value: 'agents') between Shortcuts and Providers, and Agents content panel.
Additive: Window interface extension with getCustomAgents and setCustomAgents on api property.

Additive: 17 agent-related i18n keys including dialog.agents.* (manage, create, edit, name, prompt, model, variant, temperature, top_p, color, delete, source.builtin, source.custom) and settings.agents.* (title, description).

caveats: Custom agents stored in electron-store with no runtime schema validation
Delete action is immediate with toast — no confirmation dialog
Model select hidden when no providers connected

features.name: Context Display Enhancement
features.description: Color-coded context usage indicator: green < 80%, yellow 80-94%, red >= 95%. Compaction detection via sync.data.part[] compaction message parts. Compacted badge (yellow dot top-right of ProgressCircle). Tooltip shows compaction indicator with collapse icon.

files.summary: Color-coded usage thresholds (green <80%, yellow 80-94%, red >=95%) via CSS vars. Compaction detection iterating sync.data.part[] for compaction type messages. Compacted badge (yellow dot, absolute positioned). Tooltip with compaction icon and collapse symbol. Net +54 lines.

caveats: Compaction detection reads messages array client-side — does NOT use SSE compaction events from server
Unused import (createSignal) removed during finding fix — verified clean

features.name: Settings Polish
features.description: Settings dialog reorganized with Agents tab integrated between Shortcuts and Providers. Uses existing Kobalte Tabs component with vertical orientation. All changes are additive (8 lines), no existing code restructured.

files.summary: Imported SettingsAgents, added Agents tab trigger (icon: brain, value: 'agents') between Shortcuts and Providers, added Agents content panel after Models content.

caveats: Cross-panel settings search not implemented — deferred to Phase 2
Keyboard navigation provided by Kobalte Tabs (pre-existing, not enhanced by this change)

files_preserved_from_prior_sessions.reason: Has lazy IPC handler edits from prior sessions — our handlers appended to end of registerIpcHandlers
Runtime performance edits (port discovery, IPC split, async CA certs) — untouched
Prior agent additions — our AgentDef/ElectronAPI amendments appended

non_blocking_findings.summary: Usage threshold mismatch: code used pct > 95 (strict) vs plan spec >= 95
non_blocking_findings.resolution: Changed `pct > 95` to `pct >= 95` in session-context-usage.tsx usageColor memo at line 77

preexisting_error_sources: packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts:15 (Cannot find module './install-cli' — orphaned import from prior lane)

typecheck.summary: Zero new type errors introduced across both packages. All 6 pre-existing errors originate from other active lanes.

known_issues.description: Pre-existing typecheck errors in @opencode-ai/app: Settings type missing 'setOnboarded' and 'showSessionViz' properties — not caused by this lane's changes
Keyboard shortcut overlay won't appear in CI/headless — requires real keyboard events
MCP add form only supports remote servers with name+URL (no advanced config like headers/OAuth)
packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts:15 — orphaned import './install-cli' from prior install-cli feature lane
known_issues.note: Import was added by install-cli feature which created install-cli.ts. If install-cli.ts was removed by another session, this import must be cleaned up.

known_issues.description: Custom agent deletions are immediate with no confirmation dialog — toast only
known_issues.note: Intentional design decision matching existing desktop patterns. Add confirmation if user feedback indicates accidental deletions.

deferred_items.description: Context compaction is currently detected by scanning sync.data.part[] messages client-side. The server emits compaction SSE events (event: compaction) but these are not consumed by the renderer.
deferred_items.rationale: Current approach works correctly for all existing sessions. SSE integration would improve performance for long-lived sessions with frequent compaction events.

deferred_items.description: Settings dialog has search fields within individual panels (Models, Shortcuts via Kobalte Tabs) but no global search across all settings panels.
deferred_items.rationale: Plan originally mentioned settings search but cartographer found it pre-exists in individual panels. Global cross-panel search is a genuine enhancement beyond Phase 1 scope.

deferred_items.description: Color picker has 15 swatches — no custom hex input or color palette beyond swatches. Threshold colors in context usage follow plan spec (green/yellow/red at 80/95%).
deferred_items.rationale: 15 swatches match existing desktop pattern. Custom hex input requires design system extension.

deferred_items.item: Runtime schema validation for stored custom agents
deferred_items.description: Custom agents are read from electron-store and cast to AgentDef[] with no runtime validation. Mismatched shape would surface as runtime errors.
deferred_items.rationale: Low risk since data is written by the same app version. Schema versioning is a productization concern.

deferred_items.item: Delete confirmation dialog for custom agent deletion
deferred_items.description: Current delete is immediate with toast notification only. No 'Are you sure?' confirmation step.
deferred_items.rationale: Matches existing desktop delete patterns. Add confirmation if analytics show accidental deletions.

edge_cases_and_defenses.scenario: electron-store has no 'agents' key yet (first launch)
edge_cases_and_defenses.defense: ipc handler returns (store.get('agents') as unknown[]) ?? [], UI renders no custom agents gracefully
createMemo uses (sync.data.agent ?? []).filter(...) — ?? [] handles undefined, empty list renders fallback

edge_cases_and_defenses.scenario: No providers connected when editing model
edge_cases_and_defenses.defense: Model select wrapped in <Show when={modelOptions().length > 0}>, hidden when no options

edge_cases_and_defenses.scenario: Context usage is null (no messages yet)
edge_cases_and_defenses.defense: context()?.usage ?? 0 — optional chaining handles null, usageColor returns undefined for < 80%
Wrapped in <Show when={params.id}> — entire component hidden when no session ID
Code uses pct >= 95 (fixed from > 95 per F002), correctly renders red/danger
handleSave uses parseFloat with || undefined guard

recommended_next_work: Proceed to Phase 2: Plugin marketplace UI, GitHub integration & PR publishing, full MCP management (headers/OAuth config), subagent delegation, stats dashboard. First priority: Plugin marketplace — highest remaining UX gap between TUI CLI and desktop app.
lane_freeze_condition: This lane (desktop-feature-parity-phase1) is frozen pending Phase 2 consumption. The 3 remaining Phase 1 features are delivered, verified, and all non-blocking findings resolved. Reopen only for a concrete defect inside the released boundary or when Phase 2 integration consumes these components.
